title: Indulgent Thai Rice Pad See Ew
description: A buttery, chewy pad see ew made with olive oil and low-sodium sauces, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Blanch the broccoli florets in boiling water for 1 minute, then transfer to ice water to preserve color.
Heat the olive oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add the sliced chicken to the wok and stir-fry until no longer pink, about 3 minutes.
Push the chicken to one side of the wok and add the butter, allowing it to melt and coat the pan.
Introduce the garlic, carrots, and blanched broccoli, cooking until the vegetables are just tender, about 2 minutes.
Pour in the low-sodium soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and white pepper, stirring to combine.
Add the wide rice noodles and toss everything together, letting the noodles absorb the sauce for 1-2 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then remove from heat.
Serve the pad see ew garnished with chopped scallions on a wooden board.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
